description: Use this API to return buses from starting bus to ending bus with shortest electricity distance in terms of one of two options, impedance and number of buses. The total values do not include line charging, off-nominal turns ratio, phase shifter angle etc. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0 and 35.1.0. ierr, iarray, rxvalue = rxpath(iopt, ifrom, itobus, tdim)
python_syntax: ierr, iarray, rxvalue = rxpath(iopt, ifrom, itobus, tdim)

parameters.name: iopt
parameters.description: The option to calculate the electricity distance. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: tdim
parameters.description: Number of buses along the path. (input; 1 by default).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of TDIM elements specifying the list of buses from starting bus to ending bus. (output).

return_values.name: rxvalue
return_values.description: Total value defined by iopt from starting bus to ending bus. (output).

error_codes.description: Number of buses along the path is greater than TDIM.
